TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Charles_Barkley, title = Charles_Barkley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Charles_Barkley} }

S.FORM: Charles Barkley kawas te 1963, byacing te 2 ru 20 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Alabama, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 114 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia squliq ka 76ers. lalu nya ga mhetung son nha, ana rroq qu inrkyasan nya ga, lokah balay qmol mari, nanu yasa ssyan nha mrhuw pqol mari, ru baqun kwara squliq mha hopa balay nqwaq nya pinqzyu. qutux ke' nya ini nha zngi ga, kun ga spzyang motux na ppzuy mari, Michael Jeffrey Jordan hiya ga squliq ka minkahul te binah na cinbwanan. tensu pinni'an nya 23757 ginnagal nya tensu (22.1 pasento pinni'an nya.) 12546 qnol nya mari (11.7 pasento pinni'an nya mari) 4215 rnaw nya (3.9 pasento pinni'an nya mari.) mnanak pinzi'an nya mari mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal. 50 spzyang kinhopa squliq ka ppzuy mari na NBA, mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal raykuse. minsazing magal champion na Olympic Games(1992. 1996), champion na Amerika(1992). spzyang blaq na squliq ppzuy mari(1991) minmagal magal NBA lahuy te qutux, minmagal magal NBA lahuy te sazing, kawas te 1996 magal NBA lahuy te cyugal. kawas 1985, spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, kawas te 1987, squliq ka spzyang baq qmol mari, bango na lukus nya 34, wal galun kineng na Phoenix Suns ru Philadelphia 76ers. bniru zzyaw nya kawas te 1984, mzyup squ NBA, t'aring mnanak qnxan nya ppzuy mari. mtnaq kawas qasa galun nha squ pzyang blaq lahuy na NBA. kawas te 1985, mzyup squ NBA te sazing lahuy. kwasa te 1986-1987 mrhuw nqu qnol mari(14.6 pasento pinni'an nya mari) te qutux mzyup minsing lahuy. kawas te 1987-1988, kawas1988, byacing 12, ryax 30, 41 bun qu nagal nya ru 22 qnol nya mari, 5 rnaw nya ru 6 qu qnol nya mari, hiya qu wal smi lalu nqu 40-20-5-5, kawas qasa mzyup squ NBA te qutux lahuy. kawas te 1988-1989, pinspung squ minsing, 17 bun qu nagal nya, 22 qnol nya mari(qasa ga pzyang pzyux nagal na minsing pinspngan) ru m'MVP na minsing pinspung. magal te sazing na spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari. kawas te 1992-1993, tbirun nha sa Phoenix Suns, kawas qasa magal spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, hiya ga te cyugal squliq ka tbirun nha te binah lahuy pzuy mari ru magal MVP. ru maras gluw nya mzyup squ pspngan na champion, te payat pinspung magal tasanyan, ana ga, yaqih cikay utux nya, wayal slaqux na Michael Jeffrey Jordan ka lahuy Chicago Bulls. kawas te 1996, tmwang sa lahuy na Houston Rockets, t'aring pspung mari qasa ga, 33 qnol nya mari(yasa pzyang pzyux qnol nya) kawas te 1997-1998, squliq ka te sazing 23000 bun qu nagal nya, 12000 qnol nya mari ru 4000 qu rnaw nya. kawas te 1999-2000, squzi nya yamil nya ru lukus nya aring kya mhngaw pinnzuy nya mari la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Charles Barkley kawas te 1963, byacing te 2 ru 20 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Alabama, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 114 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia squliq ka 76ers. lalu nya ga mhetung son nha, ana rroq qu inrkyasan nya ga, lokah balay qmol mari, nanu yasa ssyan nha mrhuw pqol mari, ru baqun kwara squliq mha hopa balay nqwaq nya pinqzyu. qutux ke' nya ini nha zngi ga, kun ga spzyang motux na ppzuy mari, Michael Jeffrey Jordan hiya ga squliq ka minkahul te binah na cinbwanan. tensu pinni'an nya 23757 ginnagal nya tensu (22.1 pasento pinni'an nya.) 12546 qnol nya mari (11.7 pasento pinni'an nya mari) 4215 rnaw nya (3.9 pasento pinni'an nya mari.) mnanak pinzi'an nya mari mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal. 50 spzyang kinhopa squliq ka ppzuy mari na NBA, mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal raykuse. minsazing magal champion na Olympic Games(1992. 1996), champion na Amerika(1992). spzyang blaq na squliq ppzuy mari(1991) minmagal magal NBA lahuy te qutux, minmagal magal NBA lahuy te sazing, kawas te 1996 magal NBA lahuy te cyugal. kawas 1985, spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, kawas te 1987, squliq ka spzyang baq qmol mari, bango na lukus nya 34, wal galun kineng na Phoenix Suns ru Philadelphia 76ers. bniru zzyaw nya kawas te 1984, mzyup squ NBA, t'aring mnanak qnxan nya ppzuy mari. mtnaq kawas qasa galun nha squ pzyang blaq lahuy na NBA. kawas te 1985, mzyup squ NBA te sazing lahuy. kwasa te 1986-1987 mrhuw nqu qnol mari(14.6 pasento pinni'an nya mari) te qutux mzyup minsing lahuy. kawas te 1987-1988, kawas1988, byacing 12, ryax 30, 41 bun qu nagal nya ru 22 qnol nya mari, 5 rnaw nya ru 6 qu qnol nya mari, hiya qu wal smi lalu nqu 40-20-5-5, kawas qasa mzyup squ NBA te qutux lahuy. kawas te 1988-1989, pinspung squ minsing, 17 bun qu nagal nya, 22 qnol nya mari(qasa ga pzyang pzyux nagal na minsing pinspngan) ru m'MVP na minsing pinspung. magal te sazing na spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari. kawas te 1992-1993, tbirun nha sa Phoenix Suns, kawas qasa magal spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, hiya ga te cyugal squliq ka tbirun nha te binah lahuy pzuy mari ru magal MVP. ru maras gluw nya mzyup squ pspngan na champion, te payat pinspung magal tasanyan, ana ga, yaqih cikay utux nya, wayal slaqux na Michael Jeffrey Jordan ka lahuy Chicago Bulls. kawas te 1996, tmwang sa lahuy na Houston Rockets, t'aring pspung mari qasa ga, 33 qnol nya mari(yasa pzyang pzyux qnol nya) kawas te 1997-1998, squliq ka te sazing 23000 bun qu nagal nya, 12000 qnol nya mari ru 4000 qu rnaw nya. kawas te 1999-2000, squzi nya yamil nya ru lukus nya aring kya mhngaw pinnzuy nya mari la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ βarklej kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa alaβama, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu pħila*elpħia s~ɕquliq ka **ers~ɕ. lalu nja ɣa mħetuŋ s~ɕon nħa, ana rroq qu inrkjas~ɕan nja ɣa, lokaħ βalaj qmol mari, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕs~ɕjan nħa mrħuw pqol mari, ru βaqun kwara s~ɕquliq mħa ħopa βalaj nqwaq nja pinqzju. qutux keʔ nja ini nħa zŋi ɣa, kun ɣa s~ɕpzjaŋ motux na ppzuj mari, miʦ~ʨħael *e**rej *or*an ħija ɣa s~ɕquliq ka minkaħul te βinaħ na ʦ~ʨinβwanan. tens~ɕu pinniʔan nja ***** ɣinnaɣal nja tens~ɕu (**.* pas~ɕento pinniʔan nja.) ***** qnol nja mari (**.* pas~ɕento pinniʔan nja mari) **** rnaw nja (*.* pas~ɕento pinniʔan nja mari.) mnanak pinziʔan nja mari mzjup s~ɕqu βinkɣan pinkineŋ nħa ŋas~ɕal. ** s~ɕpzjaŋ kinħopa s~ɕquliq ka ppzuj mari na nβa, mzjup s~ɕqu βinkɣan pinkineŋ nħa ŋas~ɕal rajkus~ɕe. mins~ɕaziŋ maɣal ʦ~ʨħampion na oljmpiʦ~ʨ ɣames~ɕ(****. ****), ʦ~ʨħampion na amerika(****). s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na s~ɕquliq ppzuj mari(****) minmaɣal maɣal nβa laħuj te qutux, minmaɣal maɣal nβa laħuj te s~ɕaziŋ, kawas~ɕ te **** maɣal nβa laħuj te ʦ~ʨjuɣal. kawas~ɕ ****, s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari, kawas~ɕ te ****, s~ɕquliq ka s~ɕpzjaŋ βaq qmol mari, βaŋo na lukus~ɕ nja **, wal ɣalun kineŋ na pħoenix s~ɕuns~ɕ ru pħila*elpħia **ers~ɕ. βniru zzjaw nja kawas~ɕ te ****, mzjup s~ɕqu nβa, tʔariŋ mnanak qnxan nja ppzuj mari. mtnaq kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣalun nħa s~ɕqu pzjaŋ βlaq laħuj na nβa. kawas~ɕ te ****, mzjup s~ɕqu nβa te s~ɕaziŋ laħuj. kwas~ɕa te ****-**** mrħuw nqu qnol mari(**.* pas~ɕento pinniʔan nja mari) te qutux mzjup mins~ɕiŋ laħuj. kawas~ɕ te ****-****, kawas~ɕ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ **, rjax **, ** βun qu naɣal nja ru ** qnol nja mari, * rnaw nja ru * qu qnol nja mari, ħija qu wal s~ɕmi lalu nqu **-**-*-*, kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa mzjup s~ɕqu nβa te qutux laħuj. kawas~ɕ te ****-****, pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕqu mins~ɕiŋ, ** βun qu naɣal nja, ** qnol nja mari(qas~ɕa ɣa pzjaŋ pzjux naɣal na mins~ɕiŋ pins~ɕpŋan) ru mʔm*p na mins~ɕiŋ pins~ɕpuŋ. maɣal te s~ɕaziŋ na s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari. kawas~ɕ te ****-****, tβirun nħa s~ɕa pħoenix s~ɕuns~ɕ, kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa maɣal s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari, ħija ɣa te ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕquliq ka tβirun nħa te βinaħ laħuj pzuj mari ru maɣal m*p. ru maras~ɕ ɣluw nja mzjup s~ɕqu ps~ɕpŋan na ʦ~ʨħampion, te pajat pins~ɕpuŋ maɣal tas~ɕanjan, ana ɣa, jaqiħ ʦ~ʨikaj utux nja, wajal s~ɕlaqux na miʦ~ʨħael *e**rej *or*an ka laħuj ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ. kawas~ɕ te ****, tmwaŋ s~ɕa laħuj na ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ, tʔariŋ ps~ɕpuŋ mari qas~ɕa ɣa, ** qnol nja mari(jas~ɕa pzjaŋ pzjux qnol nja) kawas~ɕ te ****-****, s~ɕquliq ka te s~ɕaziŋ ***** βun qu naɣal nja, ***** qnol nja mari ru **** qu rnaw nja. kawas~ɕ te ****-****, s~ɕquzi nja jamil nja ru lukus~ɕ nja ariŋ kja mħŋaw pinnzuj nja mari la. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
